name: Abaddon
description: The fog of war is no match for the mist of fate.

10.right: +25 Curse of Avernus Damage per Second

20.left: +100 Borrowed Time Immolation Damage per Second

25.right: +65 Curse of Avernus Attack Speed Bonus

abilities.name: Withering Mist
abilities.description: Damage instances applied by Abaddon apply a dormant debuff that activates when the affected enemy unit is below 40% max health, reducing their health restoration value by 24.5% + 0.5% per level for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Mist Coil
abilities.description: Damages an enemy unit or heals an allied unit within a 350 radius for 95/170/245/320 (130/205/280/355) damage/heal, respectively. Abaddon takes non-lethal self pure damage equal to 0.4 of the dealt amount. Cast range is 625. Cooldown is 8/7/6/5 and mana cost is 50/55/60/65.

abilities.name: Aphotic Shield
abilities.description: Applies a strong dispel and creates a barrier that absorbs damage before expiring. Deals additional damage equal to the absorbed amount within radius when destroyed. Reflects 75% of absorbed damage within radius. Cast Range: 550. Duration: 12. Damage: 120/150/180/210 (200/230/260/290). Cooldown: 12/10/8/6. Mana Cost: 110/120/130/140.

abilities.name: Curse of Avernus
abilities.description: Applies a debuff that damages over time and slows the movement speed by 10%/15%/20%/25% of the affected enemy unit. Grants all allied units bonus attack speed upon attacking the affected enemy unit, with a 10/20/30/40 (75/85/95/105) attack speed bonus lasting 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Borrowed Time
abilities.description: Removes most debuffs and heals damage taken for 4/5/6 (7/8/9) seconds when activated. Self-heal is 100% of damage received, with a health threshold of 400. Damage radius is 400, dealing 100 damage per second to nearby enemies.
